
::: {.d-block .d-lg-none}
# emLab SOP
:::

::: {.lead}
The Environmental Markets Lab (emLab) Standard Operating Procedures collect the conventions that keep our research reproducible, well organized, and easy to collaborate on.
:::

emLab is a research center at the University of California, Santa Barbara, working at the intersection of economics, environmental science, and policy. These pages are for everyone writing code or working with data at the lab, and they are meant to evolve with us. If you spot a gap or have a better way of doing something, [open an issue](https://github.com/emlab-ucsb/SOP/issues/new) to start the conversation, then send a pull request once we've agreed on the shape of the change.[^1]$^{,}$[^2]

[^1]: [Here](slides/sop-overview.qmd) is a slideshow focused on the elements of this SOP that are universal expectations for emLab coders.
[^2]: For day-to-day lab logistics — onboarding, meetings, GRIT account setup, and the like — see the separate [emLab Manual](https://emlab-ucsb.github.io/emlab-manual/).

:::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [Files](01-files/index.qmd)

Where things live and how they're organized.

- [Google Shared Drive](01-files/google-shared-drive.qmd)
- [GRIT Data Storage Space](01-files/grit-data-storage-space.qmd)
- [GitHub Structure](01-files/github-structure.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [Data](02-data/index.qmd)

Naming, formats, metadata, and confidentiality.

- [Data File Naming](02-data/data-file-naming.qmd)
- [Metadata](02-data/metadata.qmd)
- [Accessing emLab Data in R](02-data/accessing-emlab-data-in-r.qmd)
- [Tidy Data](02-data/tidy-data.qmd)
- [Data Formats](02-data/data-formats.qmd)
- [Data Use Agreements and Confidential Data](02-data/data-use-agreements-and-confidential-data.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [Code](03-code/index.qmd)

Style, documentation, and reproducibility.

- [Code Styling](03-code/code-styling.qmd)
- [Code Documentation](03-code/code-documentation.qmd)
- [Functional Programming](03-code/functional-programming.qmd)
- [Exploratory Data Analysis](03-code/eda.qmd)
- [Package Reproducibility](03-code/package-reproducibility.qmd)
- [Pipeline Reproducibility](03-code/pipeline-reproducibility.qmd)
- [Code Review](03-code/code-review.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [Git and GitHub](04-gh/index.qmd)

Version control and collaboration from setup to workflows.

- [Getting Set Up](04-gh/01-setup.qmd)
- [Repository Organization](04-gh/02-repo-organization.qmd)
- [Version Control with Commits](04-gh/03-commits.qmd)
- [Using Issues](04-gh/04-issues.qmd)
- [Working with Branches](04-gh/05-branches.qmd)
- [Pull Requests](04-gh/06-pull-requests.qmd)
- [Rulesets](04-gh/07-rulesets.qmd)
- [Effective Workflows](04-gh/08-workflows.qmd)
- [Public Repositories for Publications](04-gh/09-public-repos.qmd)
- [GitHub Extensions in Positron and VS Code](04-gh/10-gh-extensions.qmd)
- [GitHub Copilot](04-gh/11-github-ai-assistants.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [Quarto](05-quarto/index.qmd)

Authoring reproducible documents and websites.

- [Chunk Best Practices](05-quarto/chunk-best-practices.qmd)
- [Figures, Tables, and References](05-quarto/figures-tables-references.qmd)
- [Citations and Bibliography](05-quarto/citations-and-bibliography.qmd)
- [Caching](05-quarto/caching.qmd)
- [Using R targets](05-quarto/targets-integration.qmd)
- [Themes and Dark Mode](05-quarto/themes-and-cosmetics.qmd)
- [Publishing](05-quarto/publishing.qmd)
- [Presentations](05-quarto/presentations.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [Servers](06-hpc/index.qmd)

Running jobs on Sequoia and Quebracho.

- [Resources and Software](06-hpc/resources-and-software.qmd)
- [Getting Set Up](06-hpc/getting-set-up.qmd)
- [Using Sequoia](06-hpc/using-sequoia.qmd)
- [Using Quebracho](06-hpc/using-quebracho.qmd)
- [Best Practices](06-hpc/best-practices-and-resource-allocation.qmd)
- [Accessing Data](06-hpc/accessing-data.qmd)
- [Accessing Code](06-hpc/accessing-code.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
### [Publications](07-publications/index.qmd)

Authorship, reports, and sharing outputs.

- [Affiliation and Authorship](07-publications/affiliation-and-authorship.qmd)
- [Reports](07-publications/reports.qmd)
- [Publishing Data](07-publications/publishing-data.qmd)
- [Sharing on Website](07-publications/sharing-on-website.qmd)
:::

::::
